parameters.fileContent:
={{ $('Aggregate Results').first().json.report + '

---

**Quality Gate Status: PASSED** on ' + $('Aggregate Results').first().json.today + '
Ready for launch.' }}
parameters.commitMessage: ={{ `Update state: quality gate PASSED for ${$('Aggregate Results').first().json.businessName}` }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'PASS', message: 'Quality gate passed - ready for launch', businessId: $('Aggregate Results').first().json.businessId, businessName: $('Aggregate Results').first().json.businessName, passedChecks: $('Aggregate Results').first().json.passedChecks, totalChecks: $('Aggregate Results').first().json.totalChecks }) }}

parameters.commitMessage: ={{ `Quality gate FAILED for ${$('Aggregate Results').first().json.businessName} (${$('Aggregate Results').first().json.criticalFailures} failures)` }}

parameters.subject: ={{ `Quality Gate FAILED: ${$('Aggregate Results').first().json.businessName} (${$('Aggregate Results').first().json.criticalFailures} failures)` }}
parameters.message: ={{ $('Aggregate Results').first().json.report + '\n\nGitHub issues have been created for each failure in repo: ShalinPatel670/' + $('Aggregate Results').first().json.repoName }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'FAIL', message: 'Quality gate failed - see report for details', businessId: $('Aggregate Results').first().json.businessId, businessName: $('Aggregate Results').first().json.businessName, passedChecks: $('Aggregate Results').first().json.passedChecks, totalChecks: $('Aggregate Results').first().json.totalChecks, criticalFailures: $('Aggregate Results').first().json.criticalFailures, failures: $('Aggregate Results').first().json.failures }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ agent: 'Quality Gate', message: 'QUALITY GATE FAILED for ' + $('Aggregate Results').first().json.businessName + '. ' + $('Aggregate Results').first().json.criticalFailures + ' critical failures: ' + $('Aggregate Results').first().json.failures.map(f => f.check).join(', '), severity: 'critical', businessId: $('Aggregate Results').first().json.businessId, requiresResponse: false }) }}
